creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Thanks for maintaining the lang/gcc14 port.

It seems lang/gcc14 is missing the "jit" from the LANGUAGES[0] as is present in older version ports[1]. This is what provides libgccjit.so.

References:
[0] https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/blob/main/lang/gcc14/Makefile#L76
[1] https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/blob/main/lang/gcc13/Makefile#L77

Thanks!
